response.original_title: Taken without a Trace: Women and illegal adoptions in La Araucanía
response.overview: "Taken without a Trace: Women and illegal adoptions in La Araucanía, Chile" is a documentary that explores the tragedy of illegal adoptions in Chile, focusing on the testimonies of women from Temuco. Through an intimate lens and a gender-based perspective, the film reveals the emotional and social impact of these practices that occurred between the 1960s and 1990s, highlighting the pain of mothers who were separated from their children and their ongoing search for truth, justice, and reparation.
response.title: Taken without a Trace: Women and illegal adoptions in La Araucanía
